raw_consumer_statement:
My AMEX card was registered with XXXX to cover monthly payments for XXXX XXXX and one other subscription. Monthly charges for the last 3 years averaged less than {$20.00}. On XX/XX/2024 a third party gained access to my XXXX account and attempted to charge {$4800.00} for computer hardware on the account. The charge was declined by AMEX. I was not informed by either XXXX or Amex of the charge attempt. On XX/XX/2024 a third party charged {$2000.00} on the account for computer hardware. This charge was allowed by AMEX notwithstanding the prior fraudulent attempt, the amount was far in excess of my monthly average and the delivery address was in a different city from my billing, business or home address. The ordered hardware was shipped and XXXX delivery records show the actual delivery to be other than either of my registered addresses. 

AMEX has refused to acknowledge this as fraud and has debited my account for the full amount of {$2000.00} for a product I did not order or receive. XXXX will not review the matter since the product was shipped.
